title: 🎉 Introducing Task Assigner – Now Live on the monday.com Marketplace! 🎉
excerpt: We’re excited to share that our latest app, Task Assigner, is now available for all monday.com users! Designed to bring clarity, fairness, and flow to your team’s task planning, Task Assigner makes it easy to keep everyo…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to share that our latest app, Task Assigner, is now available for all monday.com users! Designed to bring clarity, fairness, and flow to your team’s task planning, Task Assigner makes it easy to keep everyone on the same page and projects moving forward.

What can Task Assigner do?

Assign tasks clearly and confidently with real-time insights into team member availability and workload.
Instantly visualize out-of-office status to avoid assigning work to unavailable team members.
Balance task loads automatically and make fast adjustments as workloads or priorities change.
Sync with Outlook calendars to ensure only available team members are assigned work. (Google calendars coming soon!)
Filter by date range or team member for quick, fair, and efficient planning.
Keep everyone looped in with automated notifications and ownership updates.

Huge thank you to everyone who contributed ideas, feedback, and energy to bring this app to life. We’re excited for you to try it and can’t wait to hear your feedback!

Feel free to comment below or reach out with questions and suggestions!
